modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to watch video due to pop-up blocker in Internet Explorer

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to watch a video on their computer using Internet Explorer. When they clicked on the video, nothing happened, and they were confused about why it didn’t work. They mentioned something about a pop-up blocker, but it was unclear if that was the only issue. Additionally, they were having trouble exporting data to Excel, which seemed unrelated but added to their frustration.
